characters.appearance: 3D animated female character. Young adult appearance, fair complexion, large green eyes, and reddish-brown hair styled in a high bun. She wears small gold hoop earrings.
characters.wardrobe: A simple, light-colored (possibly white or cream) top.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, encouraging, and expressive, typical of an animated character.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, fair complexion, long straight blonde hair with dark roots. She has dark eyeliner and defined eyebrows.
characters.wardrobe: A plain grey long-sleeved shirt or sweatshirt.
characters.demeanor: Initially hesitant and focused on her hands, becoming more engaged and surprised as the conversation progresses.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character B says: Yes, I know English. [Yes, I know English.]
Character A says: Technically correct है, लेकिन native speakers अक्सर कहते हैं, 'I speak English'. [Technically it's correct, but native speakers often say, 'I speak English'.]
Character B says: I speak English. [I speak English.]
Character A says: How old are you? [How old are you?]
Character B says: I am twenty-four years. [I am twenty-four years.]
Character A says: आपका मतलब है, 'I am twenty-four years old'. [You mean, 'I am twenty-four years old'.]
Character B says: I am twenty-four years old. [I am twenty-four years old.]
Character A says: What is your name? [What is your name?]
Character B says: My name is Nesly. [My name is Nesly.]
Character A says: Native speakers अक्सर कहते हैं, 'I'm Nesly'. [Native speakers often say, 'I'm Nesly'.]
Character B says: I'm Nesly. [I'm Nesly.]
Character A says: Well done! [Well done!]
Character B says: Thank you, पर आप कौन हो? [Thank you, but who are you?]
Character A says: मैं Supernova पर आपकी AI tutor हूँ। हम रोज़ ऐसे ही बात करके English सीख सकते हैं। [I am your AI tutor on Supernova. We can talk like this every day to learn English.]
Character B says: अरे, पर मेरी English तो बहुत basic है। मैं बोल नहीं पाती। [Ah, but my English is very basic. I can't speak.]
Character A says: कोई बात नहीं! मैं आपको हिंदी में समझा सकती हूँ। [No worries! I can explain things to you in Hindi.]
Character B says: आपको हिंदी आती है? [You know Hindi?]
Character A says: बिल्कुल, मैं एक AI हूँ। [Of course, I am an AI.]
Character B says: सही है, मैं अभी ये app download करती हूँ। [That's great, I'm going to download this app right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: learner makes common English mistakes.
- Demonstrates the solution: AI tutor corrects mistakes gently and naturally.
- Introduces the brand (Supernova) and its key feature (Hindi-medium instruction).
- Ends with a clear call to action (downloading the app).
